dropped.reason: below threshold but borderline — file as nice-to-have not must_fix

reasoning: 29 findings cleared the ≥80 confidence filter, including 1 critical (sfh-04: audit chain stub) and 14 high. The brief asked to 'make it the best as of May 11, 2026' — this is fundamentally a refactor + redesign brief, not a parcel-and-go feature. Auto-proceeding to Phase 4 would re-implement large portions of forge/src and the SKILL.md pipeline blindly. The right move is to surface the must_fix list, group into shippable redesign tracks, and let the user pick which tracks to execute next.

track-1-audit-chain-honesty.priority: CRITICAL — ship-blocker for the product's marketing claim
track-1-audit-chain-honesty.scope: Either (a) document that gate-level signing is the real path and per-tool-call signing requires upstream protect-mcp v2; or (b) write a 10-line PreToolUse bash hook that hashes + signs and STOP stubbing protect-mcp/hooks.json. Today's behaviour is 'we ship a signed audit chain' in README + 'we blank the upstream signer' in install.ts. Pick one.

track-2-cli-foundation.priority: HIGH — every other CLI improvement depends on this
track-2-cli-foundation.scope: Adopt citty (or commander v13). Replace ad-hoc argv.indexOf with a real subcommand router. Single VERSION import from package.json. Replace spawnSync with Bun.$. Add @clack/prompts (or picocolors) for TTY-aware output. Add --output json everywhere. Estimated -200 LOC net, +typed args + auto-help + completions.

track-3-install-decomposition.priority: HIGH — install.ts is the riskiest file in the repo
track-3-install-decomposition.scope: Split install.ts into src/install/{prereqs,marketplaces,settings,plugins,post-install,smoke}.ts each ≤80 LOC. Per-step error tracking. Write an install-manifest.json. Symmetrize uninstall. Extract walkFiles helper (used 4×). Centralize runClaude(args, {required}).

track-4-distribution-reach.scope: (a) Stop auto-sudo-installing 8 system tools without consent — gate behind --yes-prereqs or interactive prompt or `forge install --prereqs-only`. (b) Ship 5 platform binaries via `bun build --compile --target=...` + GitHub Releases + brew tap. The npm package becomes a downloader (esbuild-style). Windows support becomes plausible.
track-4-distribution-reach.effort: L — 1 week including CI release pipeline

track-5-types-and-shape.priority: MEDIUM — fast win, blocks tier-2 hardening
track-5-types-and-shape.scope: Define ClaudeSettings interface in src/types.ts. Template-literal type for PluginSpec. Discriminated union for HealthResult. Delete dead-expression in logLine; replace with appendFile. Use crypto.randomUUID in writeJsonAtomic.

track-6-pipeline-redesign.priority: MEDIUM — the pipeline works but is expensive
track-6-pipeline-redesign.scope: Tiered council (small diff → 2 personas sonnet; medium → 4 sonnet + opus judge; large → 6 opus). Per-path mutation threshold map. LLM-driven PBT property derivation instead of static-table. Multi-heuristic browser-verify dev-server detection.

track-7-tests-on-the-CLI-itself.priority: MEDIUM — test coverage is plugin-heavy, src-thin
track-7-tests-on-the-CLI-itself.scope: Add tests/unit/{install,doctor,uninstall,update,cli,state}.test.ts with mocked fs + injected ctx. Convert L3 to cassette-replay mode for PR CI; gate live `claude -p` runs behind CI=live for weekly cron.

track-8-strategic-positioning.priority: STRATEGIC — affects whether forge has a moat in 2027
track-8-strategic-positioning.scope: Pick a lane vs. Codex/OpenCode/Aider/Claude Code. Recommendation: forge does NOT chase TUI parity (lost cause vs. opencode + codex). Forge OWNS the 'audit-grade shipping pipeline' niche — CI integration, GitHub Actions, scheduled runs, signed compliance trails, mutation+PBT enforcement. Drop ambitions toward interactive mode; double down on '/forge:forge' as a pipeline orchestrator that runs unattended.

track-9-doc-cleanups.scope: Link every workaround comment to upstream issue. Fix cli.ts file docstring stale claims. PR the claude-mem marketplace.json fix upstream.

next_action_recommended: Surface these 9 tracks to the user. Ask which tracks they want forge to schedule for Phase 4 in this session vs. defer to follow-up runs. Track-1 (audit chain honesty) is the only one I'd push as 'do now regardless' — it's a documentation+10-line-hook fix and removes a credibility hazard.
